# baseten Provider

Terraform provider for Baseten.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Baseten API key. Can also be set with `BASETEN_API_KEY`.
- `endpoint` (String) Baseten Management API endpoint.
